name: UTOPIA
subtitle: CV & Audio Manipulator
summary: Multipurpose CV and audio utility in 10 HP. Four attenuverters, a ±10 V offset generator, a 4-to-3 mixer that doubles as a buffered splitter, a voltage-controlled LFO ranging from 30 seconds to 440 Hz, and a Pulserizer effect that distorts signals into square waves.
